local_validation.notes: Prompt guide initially failed on unrelated sibling continuity and passed with the documented PROMPT_GATE_SKIP_CONTINUITY=1 path. Wellness after rebase reported primitive registry alignment and kernel-native API within envelope; public views/health and api/health reads timed out and were reported as attention. Floor proof returned 14 after updating the floor. New locals proof returned 20. Existing BML native compiler proof returned 39. The native binary probe produced a 36048 byte binary and passed INT, FLOAT, CHAR, ADD, CHOOSE, and LOCALS stdout parity with empty stderr. BML compiler runtime returned 131012.

ci_validation.notes: Pending rebase, worktree PR guard, push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Pending merge and public deployment verification for the substrate/Form surface.
